_note_allowed_senders: SECURITY BOUNDARY. Only shares from these handles are ever processed; anyone else is ignored. List everyone allowed to trigger it — usually just your own handle, but add a partner/teammate if you want them to feed it too. At least one required.
_note_categories: Your tabs are ADAPTIVE — they grow from what YOU send, not a fixed list. Leave `categories` empty to let it discover yours; or pre-seed your interests (e.g. ["woodworking","crypto","climbing"]). `discover_categories` lets the classifier coin a new category when nothing fits (recommended on).
